title: Quiet Copper Golems and Chests
description: Drastically Reduces the volume of copper golems and copper chests, but does not completely remove their audio.
body: Drastically **_Reduces the Volume of Copper Golems and Copper Chests_**. Golem sorting is now tolerable, but **you can still hear them especially when they open regular chests** as I left those alone. I may reduce their volume further in the future if it is wanted. Created by Solher
